name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity reports the offending token in the unknown_vocab=<token> spec=<filename> format per §25.2
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-x arch && printf 'F-4 minimal\n' > arch/a.md && printf '%s' '{"name":"x","command":"echo madeupkey: 1","expect":{"exit_code":0}}' > pending/F-4-x/c.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-x --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'unknown_vocab=madeupkey spec=c.json' out.txt && echo flagged 1>&2
